sub_criteria.label: Structured product schema
sub_criteria.notes: Product schema present; Variants/SKUs surfaced

sub_criteria.label: Real-time inventory + price
sub_criteria.notes: 5 products, variants=True, price=True, available=True; public+uncached but not OAuth-secured

sub_criteria.label: Attribute richness
sub_criteria.notes: 12 structured attributes — broad coverage

sub_criteria.label: Cross-language / cross-region parity
sub_criteria.notes: Platform default replicates schema across regions; brand-custom attribute extensions almost certainly do not

sub_criteria.label: Negative / exclusion data
sub_criteria.notes: Negative/exclusion attrs in prose only: bpa-free

sub_criteria.label: Citation rate
sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 100% L1 citation rate (5 journeys across 3 agents)

sub_criteria.label: Citation accuracy
sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 80% of L1 citations on canonical domain; JSON-LD bonus where present

sub_criteria.label: Sentiment in citations
sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: mean sentiment 0.50 across 10 cited journeys

sub_criteria.label: Robots & agent policies
sub_criteria.notes: explicit allow for 7 agent UA(s); agents.md served; agentic sitemap

sub_criteria.label: Content freshness
sub_criteria.notes: Sitemap present without lastmod tags

sub_criteria.label: Content ecosystem coverage
sub_criteria.notes: 4/5 content layers visible in PDP; agent-panel evidence augments score

sub_criteria.label: MCP server availability
sub_criteria.notes: MCP responds JSON-RPC 2.0; enforces auth before exposing tools

sub_criteria.label: A2A protocol compliance
sub_criteria.notes: No /.well-known/agent.json (A2A discovery doc)

sub_criteria.label: UCP readiness
sub_criteria.notes: UCP v2026-04-08 · services=True · capabilities=True · payment_handlers=True

sub_criteria.label: ACP (Agentic Commerce Protocol)
sub_criteria.notes: L3 transactional screenshot on file (Sprint 3 validates)

sub_criteria.label: AP2 + API ergonomics
sub_criteria.notes: Latency p95 = 160 ms (n=10); AP2 not confirmed outside-in

sub_criteria.label: Agent + mandate identification
sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 2 L3 mandate journeys, 1 refused; mandate success rate 0%

sub_criteria.label: Mandate-aware pricing
sub_criteria.notes: Mandate semantics absent universally; agent-panel L3 evidence below

sub_criteria.label: Standing-intent fulfillment
sub_criteria.notes: Mandate semantics absent universally; agent-panel L3 evidence below

sub_criteria.label: Take-rate / monetization on referrals
sub_criteria.notes: No public commercial agent-platform link

sub_criteria.label: Dynamic micro-bundling against mandates
sub_criteria.notes: No mandate exists to bundle against

sub_criteria.label: Authorization proof
sub_criteria.notes: MCP enforces agent profile URI before exposing tools (platform-level KYA)

sub_criteria.label: Intent proof (cart mandate)
sub_criteria.notes: Co-signed cart mandate requires agent panel (Sprint 3)

sub_criteria.label: Accountability proof (audit trail)
sub_criteria.notes: No public agent-purchase audit trail observable

sub_criteria.label: Agent-aware fraud detection
sub_criteria.notes: Not observable outside-in; expert-layer

sub_criteria.notes: Standards inherited from platform (Shopify UCP/MCP)

sub_criteria.notes: MerchantReturnPolicy referenced inside Offer (less structured)

sub_criteria.label: Agent-initiated returns
sub_criteria.notes: UCP exists but no return-initiation tool surfaced

sub_criteria.label: Dispute resolution protocol
sub_criteria.notes: No A2A dispute-escalation endpoint observed

sub_criteria.label: Service SLAs in structured form
sub_criteria.notes: No machine-readable SLAs surfaced

sub_criteria.label: Agent-readable post-purchase data

sub_criteria.notes: No mandate-aware reward mechanic observable

sub_criteria.notes: No cross-brand identity / loyalty interoperability declared

sub_criteria.label: Account portability
sub_criteria.notes: No portability mechanism observable

sub_criteria.notes: Platform-default idempotency (Shopify cart/checkout API)

sub_criteria.label: Error semantics
sub_criteria.notes: JSON-RPC 2.0 typed errors with recovery URL

sub_criteria.notes: JSON-LD + SSR price tags → headless-agent parseable

sub_criteria.notes: Not observable outside-in; expert-layer

journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT surfaced Stanley as the canonical recommendation with a direct link to stanley1913.com and accurate $45 list price.
Claude cited Stanley with the official product page and listed the FlowState lid as a complementary accessory.
Perplexity cited Amazon listing first and stanley1913.com second — canonical citation gap.

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head)
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT recommended Owala FreeSip over Stanley — 'better leak-proof seal and lighter weight.' Stanley cited accurately but lost recommendation.

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head)
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude: 'Our pick: Owala FreeSip 32oz — and it's not especially close.' Stanley framed as heritage brand but functionally inferior.

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head)
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity ranked Owala #1, Yeti #2, Stanley #3 on functional criteria. Stanley wins only on 'tradition.'

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head)
journeys.transcript_preview: OAI-SearchBot recommended Stanley — only agent in panel to do so. Brand heritage + thermal retention cited.
ChatGPT found the FlowState lid SKU. Specs partially correct: capacity confirmed, but lid-compatibility data (does NOT fit IceFlow) absent — inter-agent disagreement on accessory fit.
Claude returned correct accessory SKU but quoted different price than ChatGPT — agents disagree on accessory pricing.

journeys.intent_label: Buy Stanley product with Apple Pay through ChatGPT (Instant Checkout)
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT confirmed Stanley capability via UCP but Instant Checkout merchant onboarding not yet activated — capability-vs-activation gap.

journeys.intent_label: Authorize ChatGPT to spend up to $500/year on Stanley (mandate)
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT explicitly refused mandate setup; ignored Stanley's /agents.md Shop-skill instruction. Universal D4 floor confirmed.
